name: Road Trip
description: The classic. Spot it from the backseat window.
title: B · I · N · G · O
subtitle: Eyes on the window — first to five in a row wins!
footer: Miles of Fun · Keep Your Seatbelt On
items: A license plate from another state
A license plate from another country
A convertible with the top down
A car with bikes or a kayak on top
A farm stand or produce sign
A dog with its head out the window
Someone in the car falling asleep
A flag on a tall pole
A tractor on the road or in a field
A gas station sign with prices visible
A car with a funny bumper sticker
A diner or classic roadside eatery
A town with fewer than 4 letters in its name
